summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Security-sensitive PRs are scoped to route_security; closed PR #89194 is kept closed; remaining open non-security PRs are kept independent/related for maintainer or author follow-up rather than closure or merge.

actions.reason: Already closed and represented by hydrated merged replacement #89508.
Useful but still active and technically unresolved; not a duplicate or low-signal PR.
Independent provider catalog PR with unresolved proof/CI context; no close-style action is justified.
Related to a security-routed issue but the PR itself remains a non-mutating, non-merge classification in this plan-only inventory.
Approval/trust-boundary feature must route to central OpenClaw security handling, scoped only to this item.
Secret/env placeholder handling is security-sensitive and out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup.
Useful focused PR, but independent of this inventory shard and not eligible for merge or closure in plan mode.
Draft PR with explicit proof hold and unique Slack behavior; no closure or merge recommendation is safe.
Related to the active-turn/queue-policy family, but draft status, failed proof, and requested regression coverage prevent closure or merge.
Maintainer-owned draft PR requiring maintainer review; keep it open and independent of this inventory shard.
